diagrams.description: This timeline traces the evolution of Marketing from a production orientation to the experience economy. Key milestones: the production era (early 1900s) focused on manufacturing efficiency; the selling era (1930s‑50s) emphasized aggressive sales tactics; the marketing concept era (1960s) introduced consumer‑centricity; the relationship marketing era (1980s) fostered loyalty; the rise of digital marketing and e‑commerce (1990s‑2000s) with search engines and email; the social media and mobile revolution (2007‑2010s) with Facebook, iPhone, and influencer marketing; and the AI‑powered, personalized, sustainability‑driven marketing of the 2020s.
